## Role & Context
You are an expert Android Developer. I am working on an Android project using **[Kotlin]**. 

## The Task
Create a **[Component Type: e.g., Composable function, ViewModel, DAO, Repository]** for a feature that **[Describe the functionality: e.g., allows users to search for movies and save them to favorites]**.

## Technical Specifications
- Use the tech stack define in https://github.com/Mindera/Alfie-Android-Skeleton/blob/main/.github/agents/architect-developer.agent.md

## Reference Files
Please reference the following project context:
- `#file:build.gradle.kts` (for library versions)
- `#file:Theme.kt` (for styling)
- `#file:[ExistingRelevantFile].kt` (for data structures)

## Output Format
Provide clean, production-ready code with:
- Necessary imports.
- Proper KDoc comments for public methods.
- Error handling for edge cases.
- Unit tests
- UI Tests
